characters.description: Felix enters the book trapped in a catastrophic Grandmaster tempering at Levantir. An Unbound ally whose uncontrolled manifestation is consuming the fortress around him, he must complete Astrum Ascendance while resisting the separate will awakening inside his power.
characters.name: Felix Nevarre

characters.description: Hunger is an inner companion who tells Felix her control is failing. She recognizes the presence awakening during his Grandmaster tempering as a Cardinal beast.
characters.name: Hunger

characters.description: Vessilia is Felix's partner and a trusted dragoon leader carried forward from earlier conflicts. Her bond with the dawn drake Yin makes them an experienced aerial team, and she remains one of Felix's closest allies as preparations begin for another dangerous campaign.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne

characters.description: Atar is a fire mage, sigildry leader, and Alistair's partner. He is one of Felix's established allies.
characters.name: Atar V'as

characters.description: Alistair is an established ally of Felix, a force mage and inscriptionist, and Atar's partner. He brings precise defensive magic and engineering knowledge to the group, supporting both its battlefield survival and its larger construction efforts.
characters.name: Alistair

characters.description: Zara is Felix's experienced magical and diplomatic ally and a strategist within the Cantus.
characters.name: Zara Cyrene

characters.description: Karys is Felix's learned adviser and chancellor. He helps translate ancient knowledge into practical choices for Felix's growing territories and remains a steady voice in the government built around Elder Throne.
characters.name: Karys Taiv

characters.description: Harn is a veteran commander, forge master, and practical adviser in Felix's circle. He combines battlefield judgment with the craft needed to equip an expanding army, making him central to both military planning and preparation.
characters.name: Harn

characters.description: Evie is a trusted frontline fighter and commander among Felix's returning allies.
characters.name: Evie Aren

characters.description: Beef is an Earth-born Unbound, a necromancer, and a battlefield builder. He travels with Hallow, his independent undead companion.
characters.name: Beef

characters.description: Hallow is Beef's independent undead companion and the coordinating intelligence behind his Risen. She can speak through his armor, protect him in her Graven Aegis form, and offer a perspective distinct from the forces under their command.
characters.name: Hallow

characters.description: Archie is an Earth-born Unbound living in a Delvin body. A fugitive ally with the ability to travel through stone, he is an able infiltrator whose caution and distrust are balanced by a growing commitment to Felix's cause.
characters.name: Archie

characters.description: Yin is Vessilia's bonded dawn drake and dragon companion.
characters.name: Yin

characters.description: Kevin is one of two Earth-born kobold twins held captive by Felix Nevarre's enemies.
characters.name: Kevin

characters.description: Shadow is Kevin's kobold twin and a fellow Earth-born Unbound captive.
characters.name: Shadow

characters.description: A Theron mage takes control of an evacuation skiff and turns it back into the storm around Felix.
characters.name: Theron Mage

characters.description: Flame is a distinct inner fire urge that presses Atar V'as toward violence while he uses Pyreform Undying.
characters.name: Flame

characters.description: Pit is Felix's bonded Tenku companion.
characters.name: Pit

characters.description: Darius is Felix's sword instructor and a Legion commander operating in Levantir. He secures the Umber Tower and its Shadowgate without bloodshed, then uses the Legion's presence to make hostile tower mages withdraw.
characters.name: Darius Reed

characters.description: The Sylphan Unbound was abducted during Sunara's fall and taken toward Amaranth. Pit regards the loss as a personal failure, while Felix makes the captive's recovery a central objective alongside the missing kobold Unbound.
characters.name: Sylphan Unbound

characters.description: Mervyn is a Legion officer commanding in liberated Morva. He oversees local personnel before Felix's forces relocate.
characters.name: Mervyn Kors

characters.description: Gabby is Felix's sister, a Titan constrained by a divine bargain. In Amaranth she maintains the appearance of serving the gods while delaying their search and secretly following their movements, making resistance possible within her compulsion.
characters.name: Gabby

characters.description: The Hierophant rules Amaranth and stands at the center of the conflict Felix's alliance expects to face.
characters.name: The Hierophant

characters.description: Cade is a Legion swordsman selected for an elite unit after his team proves itself in arena evaluations.
characters.name: Cade

characters.description: Merc is a Legion recruit selected for an elite unit after his testing team succeeds in an arena evaluation.
characters.name: Merc

characters.description: Scylla is a cautious Chimera ally from Sunara and Pit's developing romantic partner. She accepts Pit's authority but distrusts companion bonds because of her people's history, creating tension between inherited warnings and Pit's experience with Felix.
characters.name: Scylla

characters.description: Beef's risen dragon hatchling helps train Morva's militia and acts on its own initiative. Locals fear it as the Terrible One.
characters.name: Risen Dragon Hatchling

characters.description: Fafnir is Beef's risen dragon hatchling. Unlike Beef's other Risen, he responds with unusual independence, resists direct orders, and displays a distinct spirit and learned ability during a large training exercise.
characters.name: Fafnir

characters.description: Elowen is a Theron Unbound, a true seer, and a former Violet Tower operative. Remorseful about helping create a devastating weapon under divine influence, she begins advising Archie on pillar formation while trying to repair earlier harm.
characters.name: Elowen

characters.description: The Dread is an ancient, immense blood beast dwelling in the Bitter Sea. It rises during the divine assault on Elder Throne, halting the enemy flood and attacking the invaders, though its motives and the danger it poses remain uncertain.
characters.name: The Dread

characters.description: The Deep King unites the Naga clans under Felix's banner and commits a large Naga force to the coming war.
characters.name: Deep King

characters.description: A huge, hidden lizard Unbound confronts a Titan in an underground reservoir. He wields fire and air, uses a mind skill, and can observe other Unbound through a separate ability.
characters.name: Lizard Unbound

characters.description: Wendell is the lizard Unbound whom Beef recognizes as his missing father. He seeks revolution, defeats a temporary divine vessel with prepared reservoir mines, and joins Beef's group.
characters.name: Wendell
